fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Substitute No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that can be used as a substitute.

fields.name: Substitute Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the variant that can be used as a substitute.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the substitute item.

fields.name: Inventory
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units (such as pieces, boxes, or cans) of the item are available.

fields.name: Interchangeable
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the item and the substitute item are interchangeable.

fields.name: Condition
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a condition exists for this substitution.

fields.name: Substitute Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the item that can be used as a substitute.

fields.name: Sub. Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number of the catalog substitute item.

fields.name: Relations Level
fields.tooltip: Specifies the priority level of this substitute item.

fields.name: Quantity Avail. on Shpt. Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the substitute item quantity available on the shipment date.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.
